matchedText: We decided to use npm for publishing because better-sqlite3 is a native module that is not yet supported under Bun's test runtime.

matchedText: We decided to store recall cache in JSON files while the schema is still changing.

title: We decided to store recall cache in SQLite instead of JSON files because tran...
matchedText: We decided to store recall cache in SQLite instead of JSON files because transactions prevent stale reads and keep cache invalidation explicit.

title: We decided to pin the release workflow to Node 22 because setup-node Node 20 ...
matchedText: We decided to pin the release workflow to Node 22 because setup-node Node 20 could not expand the test/**/*.test.ts glob in the release job.

title: Avoid readFileSync slurping for real-history indexing; stream JSONL line by l...
matchedText: Avoid readFileSync slurping for real-history indexing; stream JSONL line by line and skip pathological raw lines under a max-byte guard.

title: We decided --no-max-bytes should lift the default parser size cap for dogfood...
matchedText: We decided --no-max-bytes should lift the default parser size cap for dogfooding real history, while retaining the per-line sanity guard so one giant JSONL line cannot exhaust memory.

title: Command text, exit codes, file paths, and tool error flags improve keyword re...
matchedText: Command text, exit codes, file paths, and tool error flags improve keyword recall without bloating user and assistant snippets.

title: JSON, --plain, and piped output stay deterministic and never emit ANSI panels.
matchedText: JSON, --plain, and piped output stay deterministic and never emit ANSI panels.

title: We decided the release checklist should document that GitHub Actions uses npm...
matchedText: We decided the release checklist should document that GitHub Actions uses npm publish --provenance with a repo NPM_TOKEN secret.

title: It prevents repeating the failed classic token and 2FA-required publish paths.
matchedText: It prevents repeating the failed classic token and 2FA-required publish paths.

title: We decided extraction precision gets a CI gate at the currently achievable fl...
matchedText: We decided extraction precision gets a CI gate at the currently achievable floor and a separate target at the aspirational SOTA bar.

title: We decided recall-question-count should be a gate because a benchmark with to...
matchedText: We decided recall-question-count should be a gate because a benchmark with too few questions can look green while missing major recall categories.

title: We decided real-history recall scoring should accept a session-level hit when...
matchedText: We decided real-history recall scoring should accept a session-level hit when the expected answer is in the correct session, because snippets can surface neighboring exchanges while still proving the right prior conversation was found.
